panel.title: VetSaaS assistant
panel.subtitle: Product help · read-only clinic lookups
panel.welcome: I can explain how to use VetSaaS or look up clinic data: patients, owners, products, alerts, and today’s summary.
panel.empty_hint: Pick a shortcut or type your own question.
panel.not_configured: OPENAI_API_KEY was not found on the server. If you already added it to .env, restart PHP (Herd/php-fpm) or run php artisan config:clear and reload.
panel.error: I couldn’t reply right now. Please try again in a few seconds.
